'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 55''' was the fifty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 15]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Search for [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[Assassin/Legends|Assassin]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[Krayn]]
*[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] - [[Slave I/Legends|Slave 1's]] [[Tipoca City/Legends|Landing Platform]]
*[[G-2RD series guard droid|G-2RD Guard Droid]]
*Land [[Laser/Legends|Lasers]]
*[[Slave II]]
